import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import config

print\('=== Credential Check ==='\)
issues = config.validate\(\)
if issues:
    for i in issues:
        print\(f'  MISSING: {i}'\)
else:
    print\('  All credentials set OK'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== Google Drive Connection Test ==='\)
try:
    from google.oauth2 import service_account
    from googleapiclient.discovery import build
    creds = service_account.Credentials.from_service_account_file\(
        config.GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE,
        scopes=['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive'],
    \)
    service = build\('drive', 'v3', credentials=creds\)
    results = service.files\(\).list\(
        q=f\\"'{config.GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID}' in parents and trashed=false\\",
        fields='files\(id, name, mimeType\)',
        pageSize=10,
    \).execute\(\)
    files = results.get\('files', []\)
    print\(f'  Connected OK — {len\(files\)} item\(s\) in Drive folder:'\)
    for f in files:
        print\(f\\"    - {f['name']} \({f['mimeType']}\)\\"\)
    if not files:
        print\('  \(Folder is empty — no videos uploaded yet\)'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'  ERROR: {e}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== Zernio API Test ==='\)
import requests
try:
    resp = requests.get\(
        'https://zernio.com/api/v1/accounts',
        headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {config.ZERNIO_API_KEY}'},
        timeout=10,
    \)
    print\(f'  Status: {resp.status_code}'\)
    print\(f'  Response: {resp.text[:300]}'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'  ERROR: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\1mabd\\Desktop\\ebizzzzzzzzzzzzzz\\Build2Millions\\ClipRadar App\\posting automation" && python -c "
import sys, json
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import config, requests

resp = requests.get\(
    'https://zernio.com/api/v1/accounts',
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {config.ZERNIO_API_KEY}'},
    timeout=10,
\)
data = resp.json\(\)
accounts = data.get\('accounts', []\)
print\(f'Zernio accounts \({len\(accounts\)} total\):'\)
for a in accounts:
    print\(f\\"  - {a.get\('platform','?'\):12} id={a.get\('_id','?'\)}\\"\)

print\(\)
print\('Expected account IDs from .env:'\)
for platform, aid in config.ZERNIO_ACCOUNT_IDS.items\(\):
    match = any\(a.get\('_id'\) == aid for a in accounts\)
    print\(f\\"  - {platform:12} {aid}  {'OK' if match else 'NOT FOUND in Zernio'}\\"\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\1mabd\\Desktop\\ebizzzzzzzzzzzzzz\\Build2Millions\\ClipRadar App\\posting automation" && python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import config
from google.oauth2 import service_account
from googleapiclient.discovery import build

creds = service_account.Credentials.from_service_account_file\(
    config.GOOGLE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE,
    scopes=['https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive'],
\)
service = build\('drive', 'v3', credentials=creds\)
inbox_id = config.GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID

proc_results = service.files\(\).list\(
    q=f\\"name='processed' and '{inbox_id}' in parents and mimeType='application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed=false\\",
    fields='files\(id\)',
\).execute\(\)
processed_id = proc_results['files'][0]['id']

videos = service.files\(\).list\(
    q=f\\"'{processed_id}' in parents and trashed=false\\",
    fields='files\(id, name\)',
\).execute\(\).get\('files', []\)

for v in videos:
    service.files\(\).update\(
        fileId=v['id'],
        addParents=inbox_id,
        removeParents=processed_id,
        fields='id, parents',
    \).execute\(\)
    print\(f\\"Moved back: {v['name']}\\"\)
" 2>&1)
